name: Red Clover Blossom Liqueur
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Freshly Picked Red Clover Blossoms
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the blossoms in a jar and cover with vodka.
2. Use a spoon to push the blossoms down so they are fully submerged in the liquid.
3. Allow the mixture to steep for one week.
4. Strain the mixture through a wire strainer, pressing on the blossoms gently with the back of a spoon to extract as much juice as possible.
5. Add the sugar syrup and stir until well combined.
6. Filter the liqueur through cheesecloth to remove any remaining solids.
